name: Movistar Madrid Half Marathon
summary: Iconic half marathon through the heart of Madrid, running along Paseo de la Castellana to Plaza de Castilla and returning through Gran Vía, Puerta del Sol, and Paseo del Prado.
heroNote: Great cheering spots along Paseo de la Castellana, near Puerta de Alcalá, and around the bustling Puerta del Sol.
specialNote: This race uses wave starts. Check that the start time is correct.
